M

MacdCalculator(int, int) - Constructor for class app.service.impl.indicators.IndicatorsServiceImpl.MacdCalculator
Initializes the twin-engine tracking layout for MACD trend mapping calculations.
MACDPeriod - Variable in class app.dto.FinancialIndicatorsPeriods
An internal array tracking the three mandatory structural interval periods for MACD calculations (typically indexing fast period, slow period, and signaling smoothing period lines).
main(String[]) - Static method in class app.Main
 
Main - Class in app
 
Main() - Constructor for class app.Main
 
MainPage - Class in app.gui.views
The master application layout coordinator initializing top-level window structures.
MainPage() - Constructor for class app.gui.views.MainPage
Constructs a MainPage layout context, bootstrapping look-and-feel layers and rendering baseline components.
MenuPanel - Class in app.gui.views
A composite dashboard selector container that switches view visibility between modules.
MenuPanel() - Constructor for class app.gui.views.MenuPanel
Constructs a MenuPanel instance.
MenuTabButton - Class in app.gui.components
A highly tailored header navigation tab navigation component that extends JButton.
MenuTabButton(String) - Constructor for class app.gui.components.MenuTabButton
Constructs a MenuTabButton initialized with navigation text parameters and initial styling metrics.
